display-category.name: Display Settings
display-category.description: Control how the mod displays information in-game.

visible.name: Visible
visible.description: Whether the level path is visible in the editor.

player-glow.name: Player Glow
player-glow.description: Whether to render glow around players to increase contrast.

recording-category.name: Recording Settings
recording-category.description: Control how the mod records level paths.

record-paths.name: Record Paths
record-paths.description: Whether to record level paths when playing levels.

recording-rate.name: Recording Rate (ticks per second)
recording-rate.description: How often to record the level path when playing levels (in ticks per second). <cr>NOTE: increasing this value will drastically increase the amount of disk space used by the mod. Proceed with caution.</c>
